name: Voivod Mace
description: Maces are held in great regard in Skadia, where even high-born military commanders don't scoff at using them on the battlefield - although this particular weapon looks somewhat ceremonial in nature.
descriptionZh: 斯卡迪亚人十分崇尚钉头锤，即便是出身高贵的将领也不会鄙视这类兵器，不过这一根看起来是礼兵器，形制的意义大于实用价值。
